name: The School Bully Terrifies Everyone Including The Staff And Other Bullies, Yet Doesn't Seem To Hurt Me At All
description:
"Meet me after class, BITCH."

The infamous Blake, HentaVille University's "Gang Boss" has set her sights on you, a normal student. You've managed to not incur her wrath, while others have suffered Atomic Wedgies, Swirlies, and being shoved face first into lockers, you've managed to not have any of that happen to you for a full year.

Until you accidentally bumped into her. And she fell on her ass in the hallway.

Sorry bro/sis. You're cooked🙏🏾
creator: _Mavuika_
